evidence_rows.reading: V1.5 opened lawfully as a bounded candidacy review phase.
The current review answered which bounded context features deserve continued candidacy attention.
The branch remains below promotion threshold, so closure should preserve review results rather than force promotion or new branches.

interpretation: V1.5 has now answered its core question: which current report-only context features can stay inside bounded retained-feature candidacy review.
That is enough to close the phase successfully without promoting any feature into retained status.
Per the autonomy policy, the correct move is to enter waiting state until a new owner phase switch or trigger appears.
